name: jira-lite-workspace
description: Tracer / Jira Lite monorepo root — holds the shared git hooks (husky). App code lives in backend/ and frontend/, each with its own package.json.

scripts.check: npm run check:backend && npm run check:frontend
scripts.check:backend: cd backend && npm run lint && npm run typecheck
scripts.check:frontend: cd frontend && npm run lint && npx tsc --noEmit
scripts.build:all: cd backend && npm run build && cd ../frontend && npm run build
